owner_operator_stated: Dr. Jason A. Monroe, DDS (Owner/Founder) with Dr. Thomas Adams, DDS FICD (Founder)
notes: Address (2853 E New York St, Aurora, IL 60502) and phone (630-851-0710, confirmed via patientconnect365 listing) both corroborate this site. Careers page exists (careerplug.com portal linked) but no specific open roles are listed on-site, so treated as roster_verified rather than hiring_page_found. Six associate/owner dentists named on the About Us page. Single-location family practice, no DSO/group brand indicated.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. James Janda, DDS purchased and founded/owns Prairie Point Dental (2005); his daughter Dr. Katherine Janda-DuWaldt, DMD is an associate
notes: Address (3015 E New York St, Suite A-10, Aurora, IL 60504) and phone (630-820-2020) both match the record exactly. No careers/hiring page found on the site. Single-location family-owned practice (father/daughter), no DSO/group brand indicated.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Nasima Thobani, DDS is the founder/owner, having bought this practice in 2010
notes: Record entity 'Oakhurst Dental Care PC' does not currently occupy this address. 609 S Route 59, Aurora, IL 60504 is corroborated by exact address match to 'Advanced Family Dental of Naperville,' owned by Dr. Nasima Thobani, DDS, who bought/founded this practice at this address in 2010 (implying a prior, differently-named practice preceded her). Phone on-site is (630) 236-0500 vs record's (630) 326-0500 (digit-transposition, not an exact match, but the address match alone corroborates the site). Checked and ruled out 'Oakhurst Dental Associates' (oakhurstdental.net) as unrelated — that practice is in Oakhurst, NJ. Treated as ownership_conflict/successor: named entity has been superseded at this address.

Record entity 'Sleep Better Inc' was not found verbatim anywhere. Address (4260 Westbrook Dr #105, Aurora, IL 60504) and phone (630-851-0450) both exactly match 'Aurora Smiles,' part of a multi-location group with Yorkville Smiles and Ottawa Smiles (yorkvilleilsmiles.com domain). This suite previously housed 'Aurora Fox Valley Dental Associates' (Dr. Lawrence Gentile, 30+ yrs), which Yelp now lists as CLOSED — Aurora Smiles (est. 2019) is the current occupant. Aurora Smiles' own site offers sleep-apnea oral-appliance therapy under a 'Sleep and Smile' program, which plausibly relates to the legal name 'Sleep Better Inc,' but this is not confirmed by any source. No dedicated team/roster page or careers page found; a review mentions a 'Dr. Kim' but this is not corroborated on the practice's own site, so not included as a verified doctor. Insufficient basis to call this either a clean match or a conflict, so treated conservatively as call_required with no_statement on ownership.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Manisha Desai, DMD — Principal of Vinayak Dental, P.C. (dba Aurora Sonrisa Dental), established the practice in 2012
notes: Record entity 'Bhalla Amreen DMD' does not appear anywhere on the practice's own site or in web search results tied to this address. 5 N Root St Unit 105, Aurora, IL 60505 and phone (630) 800-1137 both exactly match 'Aurora Sonrisa Dental,' legally 'Vinayak Dental, P.C.,' solely owned/operated by Dr. Manisha Desai, DMD (established 2012). No mention of Bhalla found. Treated as ownership_conflict/successor mismatch.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Kishore Belani, DDS, FAGD founded Aurora Dentrix in 1976; now a 3-location group practice
notes: Record's practice_name reflects the individual provider 'Nana Kavita DDS,' who is confirmed as a practicing dentist within the 'Aurora Dentrix' group (founded 1976 by Dr. Kishore Belani; 3 locations — Ogden Ave, Downer Pl, Oak St). Address (57 E. Downer Place, Aurora, IL 60505) matches exactly. Record phone (530) 859-8686 has an evident area-code typo — the correct Downer Pl number is (630) 859-8686, identical apart from the area code, and this is the number listed for this exact address. Site lists 11 dentists group-wide but does not break out which specifically staff the Downer Pl location vs the other two; full group roster reported as sourced. No careers/hiring page found.
